overall.description: Game engine footage from Assassin's Creed Origins depicting the Lighthouse of Alexandria. The clip opens with a detailed view of an ornate temple gate, then transitions to the lighthouse platform featuring a large burning brazier, panoramic views of the ancient Egyptian city and distant pyramids, and concludes with views overlooking the harbor from the lighthouse edge.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple entrance with ornate metal gate

events.description: camera tilts upward to reveal the decorated stone facade above the gate

agents.ego_description: standing before a large metal gate, looking up at the temple architecture

entered.detail: large gate with geometric lattice pattern, gold accents, and black metal framework
tall fluted columns with decorative capitals and red accents
tall fluted columns with decorative capitals and red accents
carved stone relief with gold detailing and classical motifs above the gate

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on an ornate temple entrance featuring a large geometric metal gate flanked by marble columns. The camera tilts upward to reveal an elaborately decorated stone facade with carved reliefs and gold accents.

scene_state.functional_zone: lighthouse top platform with burning beacon

events.description: scene transitions from temple gate to lighthouse platform with burning brazier

agents.ego_description: moving around the burning brazier on the lighthouse platform, examining the structure and surroundings

entered.detail: tall cylindrical black metal cage containing a large fire with burning logs
massive fluted stone pillars supporting the overhead structure
massive fluted stone pillars supporting the overhead structure
stacked firewood and timber next to the brazier
thick heavy ropes lying coiled on the marble floor
round opening in the floor near the brazier

segments.scene_description: The scene shifts to the top of a lighthouse where a large metal cage containing a roaring fire stands at the center. The camera circles the brazier, revealing stone columns, piles of wood, and thick ropes scattered on the marble floor, with a vast open sky overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: panoramic overlook of coastal city and harbor

events.description: camera pans away from brazier to reveal sweeping view of the coastal city and distant pyramids

agents.ego_description: rotating to take in the panoramic vista of the ancient city, harbor, and pyramids on the horizon

entered.detail: ancient city with stone buildings, walls, and docks along the waterfront
blue water of the harbor reflecting sunlight
three pyramids visible on the hazy horizon
small vessels with sails moving in the harbor
hazy mountains in the background
small island with vegetation in the harbor

segments.scene_description: The camera pans away from the lighthouse structure to reveal a breathtaking panoramic view of an ancient coastal city with stone walls and buildings, a busy harbor with sailing vessels, and the iconic pyramids visible in the distant haze beyond the mountains.

scene_state.functional_zone: lighthouse interior under the domed roof

events.description: camera tilts upward to examine the red painted ceiling of the lighthouse structure

agents.ego_description: examining the lighthouse architecture from below, looking up at the ceiling and circling the central fire structure

entered.detail: domed ceiling painted red with decorative patterns and weathered areas
the fire cage viewed from below and different angles as camera circles

segments.scene_description: The camera turns back to the lighthouse structure and tilts upward to reveal a striking red-painted domed ceiling supported by massive stone columns. The camera circles the burning brazier, capturing the interplay of firelight and sunlight on the architectural details.

events.description: camera moves to the platform edge overlooking the harbor and city walls below

agents.ego_description: standing at the stone railing looking down at the harbor activity and city walls below

entered.detail: white stone balustrade with red-topped posts marking the platform edge
ancient stone fortification walls along the waterfront
ancient city buildings and docks seen from above

segments.scene_description: The camera moves to the edge of the lighthouse platform, revealing a stone railing with distinctive red finials. From this vantage point, the view encompasses the harbor below with sailing vessels, rocky islands, and the ancient city walls stretching along the coastline.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the intimate detail of a temple entrance to the expansive heights of the Lighthouse of Alexandria. It begins at an ornate temple gate flanked by marble columns, tilting upward to reveal a decorated stone facade with gold accents. The perspective then shifts to the lighthouse summit, circling a roaring fire within a metal brazier amidst scattered wood and ropes under a vast open sky. As the camera pans away from the structure, the scene expands into a breathtaking panorama of a coastal city and busy harbor, with distant pyramids visible through a mountain haze. Finally, the view turns back to capture a red-painted domed ceiling before gliding to the platform's edge, where a stone railing overlooks the sailing vessels and rocky islands of the coastline below.
